title: Atrox
description: Atrox(x) is Latin for spooky/horror, which is where the name for this mod originally came from. I must admit it isn't that horrifying though unless you're 3.
body:
![Title for the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89240e69788d5341c7eb5ed317ca18a715b1192f.png)
**Atrox(x) is Latin for spooky/horror, which is where the name for this mod originally came from. I must admit it isn't that horrifying though unless you're 3.**

**The mod includes:**
- 4 new mobs (including a bossfight)
- 2 new structures
- 1 new dimension
- many new blocks and items

**Mobs:**
- The Great Angel, this is the boss that you'll fight inside of a dungeon in the new dimension
- Weeping Angel, this mob is found in the new dimension
- Cracked Weeping Angel, this mob is also found in the new dimension
- Wizard, this is a new villager type found in one of the 2 new structures

![3 Hostile Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96346350a4640175d573620ed8cdae2f6254c1fe.png)

**Structures:**
- The Wizards Hut, just like a witch hut but instead of being inside of swamps you can find these in dark oak forests
- A dungeon found inside of the new dimension

**Dimension(s):**
- The Spooky Dimension, here you'll find most new blocks and mobs

**Blocks & Items:**
- Spookyrack
- Acid, also found in the spooky dimension, hurts the player when it comes in contact with it
- Spooky Leaves
- Spooky Wood
- Spooky Log
- Spooky Planks
- Spooky Stairs
- Spooky Slab
- Spooky Fence & Fence Gate
- Spooky Button
- Spooky Boat, this boat is special, it can survive being in acid
- Spooky Pressure Plate
- Trapped Stone Pressure Plate, just like a normal stone one (it explodes)
- Wizardry Table, the block which makes a villager turn into a wizard
- Acid Potions (all types)
- Spooky Frame, the portal frame to the spooky dimension (just like with obsidian for the nether, get it by trading with the wizard)
- Spooky Tablet, used to ignite the spooky frame portal (get it by trading with the wizard)
- Slinkstone, ore, block, armor and tools (found in the Spooky Dimension)
- Stone Stick, used to craft Slinkstone tools
- Spookstone, a type of glowstone found in the Spooky Dimension (block, slab and stairs)
- Spookstone dust
- The Great Altar, this spawns the great angel when you place your spooky tablet on it
- Angelic Stone, is given to the player when defeating The Great Angel
- Angelic Sword, best sword in the game (make sure to put some mending on it)

**Licenses:**
I don't know anything about licenses, if you want to use my project for anything, lmk through discord user: 'imacjack' then also credit me and you're good.
